tasks.task_description: Create MCP tool definitions for sat-outlook, sat-sfdc, builder-mcp, aws-knowledge-mcp-server, and fetch based on Amazon Q SA agent config
Update SA Agent configuration to use the MCP tools in tools.use array
Add tool aliases from Amazon Q config to SA agent

description: Add MCP tool definitions and configure SA Agent to use them
context: Created 5 MCP tool definitions: sat-outlook (Outlook calendar/email), sat-sfdc (Salesforce), builder-mcp (internal tools), aws-knowledge-mcp-server (AWS knowledge base), and fetch (web content)
Updated SA Agent configuration to use all 5 MCP tools and added the complete allowed tools list from Amazon Q SA agent config (50+ specific tool permissions)
